title: Winners of the Wilderness
writer: Marian Ainslee, Josephine Chippo, John T. Neville
actors: Tim McCoy, Joan Crawford, Edward Connelly
plot: Able wilderness fighter Colonel O'Hara loves Rene, daughter of the commander of the French forces during the French and Indian War. The Indians, under Pontiac, kidnap Rene. O'Hara hopes to rescue and wed her.
